name: HRQ_QUESTIONNAIRES_VL
query: SELECT B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, B.QUESTIONNAIRE_ID, B.QSTNR_VERSION_NUM, B.QUESTIONNAIRE_CODE, B.STATUS, B.CATEGORY_ID, B.TEMPLATE_FLAG, B.SUBSCRIBER_ID, L.NAME, L.DESCRIPTION, L.KEYWORDS, L.INTRO_TEXT, B.QSTNR_TEMPLATE_ID, B.PRIVACY_FLAG, B.UPDATE_ALLOWED, B.OWNER, B.SECTION_ORDER, B.SECTION_PRESENTATION, B.PAGE_LAYOUT, B.QSTNS_PER_PAGE, B.IN_USE, B.LATEST_VERSION, B.VERSION_DESCRIPTION, B.MODULE_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.SCORED_FLAG, B.CALC_RULE_CODE, B.MAX_POSSIBLE_SCORE, B.LAYOUT_OPTION, B.SURVEY_TYPE FROM HRQ_QUESTIONNAIRES_B B, HRQ_QUESTIONNAIRES_TL L WHERE B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = L.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND B.QUESTIONNAIRE_ID = L.QUESTIONNAIRE_ID AND B.QSTNR_VERSION_NUM = L.QSTNR_VERSION_NUM AND L.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
